artifacts.description: Declared audit scope, requested checks, and out-of-scope boundaries
Evidence source registry for this run
In-scope token deployments and evidence lineage
Per-chain block windows and contract addresses
Mint/burn aggregate vs totalSupply delta per chain

supported_claims.statement: Transfer logs in the configured block window were fetched and decoded for the scoped deployment(s).
limitations: Holds only when RPC fetch and decode gates PASS for the configured asset, chain, and block window.
Transfers are not labeled by actor type or intent.

supported_claims.statement: Pinned totalSupply boundaries are available per chain for the audit window.
limitations: Snapshots use toolkit totalSupply() calls at pinned blocks; not circulating supply across chains.

supported_claims.statement: Mint/burn aggregates are compared to pinned totalSupply deltas per chain for the audit window.
limitations: Mint/burn sums use toolkit Transfer definitions (zero-address mint/burn).
FAIL is not proof of fraud.

unsupported_claims.statement: Circulating supply across chains or through bridges is not verified by transfer-audit alone.
limitations: Per-chain totalSupply(end) is not circulating supply when inventory is bridged or held in custody.
Summing per-chain totals double-counts bridged inventory.

unsupported_claims.statement: Bridge collateral, mint authority, and reserve backing are not verified without bridge-specific collateral evidence.
limitations: On-chain transfer-audit and cross-chain-summary compare scoped deployments only; bridge attestations and collateral reserve data are out of scope without a bridge-backing evidence source.

unsupported_claims.statement: Fiat reserve adequacy and bank attestation are not verified by on-chain transfer-audit evidence.
limitations: No bank or attestation data in this toolkit.

unsupported_claims.statement: DEX pool depth, CEX liquidity, and oracle price exposure are not measured by this toolkit.
limitations: No DEX, CEX, or oracle depth series in transfer-audit or cross-chain-summary alone.

unsupported_claims.statement: Peg or price stability is out of scope for transfer-audit.
limitations: Out of scope for transfer-audit; not attested by this toolkit.

unsupported_claims.statement: Redemption capacity is out of scope for transfer-audit.
limitations: Out of scope for transfer-audit; not attested by this toolkit.

unsupported_claims.statement: User geography is out of scope for transfer-audit.
limitations: Out of scope for transfer-audit; not attested by this toolkit.

unsupported_claims.statement: Holder identity is out of scope for transfer-audit.
limitations: Out of scope for transfer-audit; not attested by this toolkit.

unsupported_claims.statement: Actual swap routing is out of scope for transfer-audit.
limitations: Out of scope for transfer-audit; not attested by this toolkit.

unsupported_claims.statement: Issuer intent is out of scope for transfer-audit.
limitations: Out of scope for transfer-audit; not attested by this toolkit.

unsupported_claims.statement: Stress transmission is out of scope for transfer-audit.
limitations: Out of scope for transfer-audit; not attested by this toolkit.
